idea-plugin.name: Window Accent
idea-plugin.description:
Window Accent helps you distinguish between multiple JetBrains IDE windows with visual cues. Some configuration is available through the tool window as well as the settings.

Color options:

  • Configure a color scheme for each IDE window
  • Choose from preset color schemes or create your own custom schemes
  • Apply color schemes to all open windows or just the current one
Title Numbering options:
  • Enable / Disable title numbering for each IDE instance preview in the taskbar
Usage:
  • Open the Window Accent tool window to manage color schemes / title numbering and apply them to your IDE windows
  • Use the settings page to configure default color schemes and title numbering preferences
This plugin is designed to be lightweight and non-intrusive, providing visual differentiation without affecting performance.
